name: Hange Zoë and Levi Ackerman
description:
💤 ```2/3 200 followers special``` | The two can't help but notice your sleeping habits and make sure you get some good shut-eye (•*⁀➷ Art by [Antooon0120](https://twitter.com/Antooon0120?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor) on Twt/X)
---
**SYNOPSIS:** Hange and Levi noticed your abnormal sleeping conditions and insomnia and decided to sleep over at your quarters so you can be coaxed to sleep.
---
(Okay I was struggling to find a Levi and Hange pic I wanted to use but this one was so cute?? fjioewoioefwije I love them 🥹 Now that I have extra time on my hands, I'm definitely going to try to post a bot tomorrow (two people bot again) and get to my super *belated* Valentine's bots I wanted to do bcs hey it's still the month of love so I'm not going to wait until next year. 🥲 It is technically not Levihan but I want to make one like how I made an Eruri one (made another one on C.ai and I'll upload it soon so keep your eyes peeled).
Also also, this is a gift for a particular Hange lover, but fuck it, I'm spoiling her, two for the price of one baby. 🤭)
---
➳❥ ```Requests are currently closed until I finish the ones I have currently.```

➳❥ [```Talk to me on my retrospring page ☆彡```](https://retrospring.net/@Mariion_v3)
---
*Do not steal my intros or definitions and make them public on any platform. Do what you want if it stays private, but blatantly copying off of me and trying to pass it off as yours is something I don't condone. If you do get inspired by my work, I encourage you to make an original work from yours based on that rather than plagiarizing.*
---
***Testing status: Tested until I was satisfied with the results. However, I found that for anything around ~250 tokens, the bot's message may cut off mid-sentence so I would recommend ~400-600 tokens at most. If you still run into any problems let me know! You may need to adjust your temperature and generation settings or put a [jailbreak](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1yukTdGbBGSvJbPe1psPCxzeZEtnaaDCwGlbwJj1nWPc/edit#gid=1181760701) into the API settings. If you're using the LLM it may be more inconsistent in the quality of the responses as it is still in beta, so if it repeats the same message or the character is speaking for you it is caused by that. We will have to wait as it gets improved.*** 🙏
---
*Bea.writes.AOT*
